**a. Unspecified (other road and pipeline transport): a.‘Other road’ includes motorcycles, vintage vehicles, tax exempt vehicles (vehicles exempted under the Disabled Drivers and Disabled Passengers (Tax Concessions) Regulations, state-owned vehicles, diplomatic vehicles, emergency vehicles, etc.), motor caravans, hearses and island vehicles.

b. ‘Pipeline transport’ refers to consumption of natural gas to support the operation of natural gas pipelines. c.Prior to 2006, consumption of fuel oil in domestic navigation was recorded in unspecified.
Sod peat is estimated due to new legislation and the methodology is under review

In the transport sector, bioLPG is included within biodiesel figures. Outside the transport sector, bioLPG is included within biomass figures.
Biodiesel comprises fatty acid methyl ester (FAME), hydrotreated vegetable oil (HVO), and co-processed hydrotreated vegetable oil (CHVO).
In the industry and services sectors, the biodiesel breakdown follows the distribution of gasoil.
